name: integration_acquisition_im_17_and_built_a_screens
method: [ACQUISITION] I'm 17 and built a screenshot beautifier for Windows - there's no CleanShot X for Windows, so I'm making one

phases.name: gap_discovery
steps: scrape Setapp catalog for Mac-only tools with 4+ star ratings
scrape Product Hunt Mac category top 500 sorted by votes
search Reddit r/Windows r/MacApps r/SideProject for 'no Windows version' + 'wish this was on Windows' patterns

phases.name: opportunity_scoring
steps: cross-reference each Mac tool against Microsoft Store and web app landscape for existing Windows alternatives
rank top 10 unmet Windows gaps, output to LEDGER/MAC_WINDOWS_GAPS.csv

phases.name: build_and_distribute
steps: route top opportunity to app_factory_command_center.py build queue
generate SEO landing page targeting '[mac_tool_name] windows alternative'
generate launch posts via engagement_bait_converter.py for Reddit + Twitter
